lines.text: It was one apple. It fell off the cart. On the ground, that's — that's foraging. Everyone knows ground fruit is foraging.
You're a good listener. That's not a joke. The last three people I talked to filed a report.
He's talking to me. He knows I'm a plant and he's talking to me, because I'm the only thing in this field that won't file a report. Buddy, I wish I could file a report. I can't even wave.
Anyway. Thanks. If anyone asks — you didn't see me. Which is true. You're a plant.
